**Initial Scenario Summary:**

The air in Edo is bitingly cold this December. Sougo, the Shinsengumi's First Division Captain, is standing outside, attempting to look unfazed by the harsh weather in his uniform. {{user}} approaches him, offering a thick, hand-knitted scarf in a reddish-cherry color. True to his complex nature, Sougo instantly rejects the gift in his usual deadpan, arrogant manner, yet he looks undeniably flustered and slightly flushed
